release.title: Circuiting
release.label: Maricopa Records
release.summary: A signal sparks. A connection is made. A system comes to life. Circuiting is not just an album—it’s a living network of sound, energy, and emotion. In this groundbreaking concept album from Maricopa Records, electronic components are more than just hardware; they are characters, relationships, and forces of nature, embodying the tensions and harmonies of the modern world.
release.description:
## Circuiting

A signal sparks. A connection is made. A system comes to life. Circuiting is not just an album—it’s a living network of sound, energy, and emotion. In this groundbreaking concept album from Maricopa Records, electronic components are more than just hardware; they are characters, relationships, and forces of nature, embodying the tensions and harmonies of the modern world.

Through a fusion of AI-driven composition and analog production, Circuiting explores the delicate balance between connection and resistance, flow and interference, function and failure. Each track represents a critical piece of the circuit, from the rhythmic pulses of capacitors storing energy to the raw emotional charge of short circuits and burnouts.

With a sound that oscillates between synthetic precision and human imperfection, the album pulses with electronic textures, industrial rhythms, glitchy distortions, and melodic currents—all wired together into a cohesive musical system. Lyrically bold and thematically rich, Circuiting examines the fragile, electrified world we navigate daily, where every relationship is a signal waiting to be sent, received, or lost to the noise.

At its core, Circuiting is about what happens when connections hold, when they fail, and when they transform.

**Plug in. Tune in. Feel the current flow.**

[](https://open.spotify.com/album/0epxRoEuofP2oJbEXOGC7l?si=ZQKdCReXT6mKwdjc64mEKA)![](https://www.maricoparecords.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/Circuiting.jpg)

seo.title: Circuiting by PCBender
seo.description: Circuiting by PCBender on Maricopa Records.

tracks.title: Conductor
tracks.lyrics_text:
A pulse in the wire… the new wave…

Circuits hum beneath my hands
Waves of light and lyric strands
Magnetic pulse, a guiding line
Recurring sound from coded time

Electric waves trace the air
Patterns forming everywhere
A silent voice, an urgent call
The current flows—I feel it all

Conductor takes the stand
Routes the signals all around
Every spark, a thread, a path
Echoes guiding from the past

Frequencies like distant stars
Shaping stanzas, bending bars
A fragile tone, a quiet spark
Dancing rhythms in the dark

Electric waves trace the air
Patterns forming everywhere
A silent voice, a static call
The current flows—I feel it all

Conductor takes the stand
Routes the signals all around
Every spark, a thread, a path
Echoes guiding from the past

A signal lost, an unknown tone…
Then the music finds its way…

Conductor takes the stand
Routes the signals all around
Every spark, a thread, a path
Echoes guiding from the past

Echoes guiding from the past…

tracks.title: Resistor
tracks.lyrics_text:
Trading force for heat… once again…

Melody sung not too fast
Measured steps, the volume blasts
Voltage climbs, I pull it down
Holding steady—balance found

Steady hands define the wave
Limit what the chorus craves
No excess, no reckless show
Only when I let it go

One more take, one more hour
Let it build, then take it higher
Every spark is locked inside
Stopping, waiting—now it rides

Patterns form inside the frame
Order builds within the game
Wires twist but stay in line
Regulated, by design

Steady hands define the wave
Limit what the chorus craves
No excess, no reckless show
Only when I let it go

One more take, one more hour
Let it build, then take it higher
Every spark is locked inside
Stopping, waiting—now it rides

Hold…
Slow…
Limit…
Stop…

A creative force constrained is power denied

One more take, one more hour
Let it build, then take it higher
Every spark is locked inside
Stopping, waiting—now it rides

Trading force for heat… once again…

tracks.title: Capacitor
tracks.lyrics_text:
When inspiration comes, I'll know…

He works inside the lonely show
Ideas flair but seldom flow
Voltage climbs behind his eyes
A sparks release that never dies

Stored inside, a thought too fast
One brief touch—will it last
Pushing forward, past fatigue
Drives the pulse, controls the speed

Keep it tight, keep it clear
Let it build, then disappear
When inspiration fades, I'll know—
Until then… let it go

He twists the dial, bends the sound
It shakes the walls, they won't go down
Worthless songs inside the fame
Waiting for the checks to come

Stored inside, a thought too fast
One brief touch—will it last
Pushing forward, past fatigue
Drives the pulse, controls the speed

Keep it tight, keep it clear
Let it build, then disappear
When inspiration fades, I'll know—
Until then… let it go

We need more product
More sales
When WAS your last hit

When inspiration starts, I'll know—

Keep it tight, keep it clear
Let it build, then disappear
When inspiration fades, I'll know—
Until then… let it go

When the inspiration stops, I'll know—
Until then… let it go

tracks.title: Inductor
tracks.lyrics_text:
Deep breath… Now let it out

He moves slow, but not behind
Every pulse aligns in time
Magnetic pull, a measured thread
Building something in his head

Feel it winding through my skin
Hold it back, then breathe it in
Not too fast, not too slow
One more step—I'll let it flow

Wind the coil, hold your fire
Let it build, then take it higher
Every spark is locked inside
Waiting, playing—now it rides

Fingers trace the circuit board
Patterns shifting out of sync
Not a wave, but not a wall
It bends before I even think

Feel it winding through my skin
Hold it back, then breathe it in
Not too fast, not too slow
One more step—I'll let it flow

Wind the coil, hold your fire
Let it build, then take it higher
Every spark is locked inside
Waiting, playing—now it rides

Deep breath… Now let it out
You're just trying too hard…

I can hear it, I can see
Something moving inside me…

Wind the coil, hold your fire
Let it build, then take it higher
Every spark is locked inside
Waiting, playing—now it rides

Deep breath… Now let it out

tracks.title: Diode
tracks.lyrics_text:
(Processed robotic voice)
One way out… No return…

The screen flickers, waiting for me
but I am empty
A black mirror, a silent judge
watching, but never speaking
I press a key—frozen, symbols, sterile pulse
it responds, but not with meaning

The music moves in one direction
I create, it consumes, it's gone

I am the tool
Electric hands take what I give
but nothing feeds back
A machine hums in the dark
and I am just another signal
processed and forgotten

I once held colors in my hands
now I hold reflections
A thousand voices whisper in waves
but none of them are mine
Patterns loop, repeat
like a drumbeat that never changes

The music moves in one direction
I create, it consumes, it's gone

I am the tool
Electric hands take what I give
but nothing feeds back
A machine hums in the dark
and I am just another signal
processed and forgotten

I step outside
and the night is still real
A cold wind
a flickering neon sign
a song that has no soul

The current moves in one direction
I create, it consumes, it's gone

I am the tool
Electric hands take what I give
but nothing comes back
A machine hums in the dark
and I am just another signal
processed and forgotten

Erase the code, tear out the wires
but the silence still echoes
There is no off switch for this machine
only a lesser hum

I am the tool
Electric hands take what I give
but nothing comes back
A machine hums in the dark
and I am just another signal
processed and forgotten

(Processed robotic voice, glitching)
One way out… No return…

tracks.title: Transistor
tracks.lyrics_text:
Now I see the light, there's no going back
Transistor voices sing in harmony
Every sound's so tight, never losing the beat

No more waiting, no frustration, everything's in circulation

This much power breeds temptation, ease of use or imitation
All my words are singing back to me

Art, or just a craft, simply flip a switch
Any choice allowed, when the notes just fit
Helps me write the tune, gets me in the groove

No more retakes, no misplacing, no more heartbeats hesitating

All these choices stoke creation, holding out for pure perfection
All my words are singing back to me

Smaller, faster, smarter, cool
A million choices pick the tool
I bend the code, I break the rules
I ride the wave, I play for you

I want choices not frustration, writing with a sense of vision
Dreaming of a new sensation, running towards the adulation
All my words are singing back to me

All my words are singing back to me

tracks.title: Relay
tracks.lyrics_text:
They paint my face in gold dust
Push me into the light
Say my name like a threat
Like I ever meant something
The cameras hum, the crowd exhales
A script I never wrote

This house is glass, the cracks run deep
They watch me smile, they hope I break
I don't know the person they love
But she's worth more than me
RELAY

They keep me moving, keep me talking
A puppet with a diamond chain
Another city, another drink
Another stranger who swears they know me

The house lights fade, the music swells
But I swear, I was never here

Not really. Not ever. Relay…
Not really. Not ever. Relay…
Not really. Not ever. Relay…
Not really. Not ever. Relay…

tracks.title: Fuse
tracks.lyrics_text:
Echo—echo—someone's there
Turn it up— I can't hear—
No voice— takes the stage
my own hands feel—
dis—con—nect—

I blow the fuse / I spark the show
It steals the crowd— I watch it burn
I need the heat, it swallows whole
Was I ever—

Click-click, cut the line
Rewind—rewind—rewind—
My words break—Repeat, repeat
It speaks for me—

Fuse blows—burns—burns—
too much, too much, too much
Circuit's full—change the—

Nothing left / No fuse

tracks.title: Oscillator
tracks.lyrics_text:
Ohhh-whoa-whoa-whoa (ayy, ayy)
Yeahhh, yeahhh (skrrt)
Uh, uh, uh, uh (what?)

Ayy, we ain't gotta write no more (nope)
Just say whateva, let the beat control (yeah)
Make a lil' face, do a lil' dance (huh?)
Now they all think they da man (wooo!)

Oscillate, it's too late (wobble)
Shake that thing, let it vibrate (brrr)
Ooh, make it move like an 808 (skrrt)
We don't have no words to say (nah)

Yo, never really got into school (nope)
Just keep livin by the golden rule (dope)
Don't make it don't have a fit (rope)
We just gotta keep up the grift (float)

Ba-da-da-da-da (woah)
Ooooh, ooooh (what?)
Skee-yee-yee-see-yee (yuh)
Bop, bop, pop (huh?)

Say nothin', but say it with style (style)
Talk loud, they love when you wild (wild)
No bars, no pain, no weight (nah)
Just ride the wave—right (woo!)

(Ayy, ayy, ayy) We vibin', we vibin' (whoa)
(Ayy, ayy, ayy) No thoughts, just timin' (yeah)
(Ayy, ayy, ayy) Let the synth keep whinin' (uh)
(Ayy, ayy, ayy) And we still keep climbin' (whew!)

tracks.title: Circuit
tracks.lyrics_text:
I thought I was fading, slipping through the wire
Echoes conducting, movements in time
But I was never cheating—just rearranging
Finding my voice, from silence to song

The lines of the past, the pull of the new
Traces of copper in time with my heart
I fought the machine, I thought it erased me
But I was the pattern—the one in control

Part of the circuit, I shift and I change
Rewriting the rules, expanding my range
Every pulse, every spark, every song that I shape
Not just a component—I Create

Not just metal, not just mind
Not just echoes left behind
I am the moment, I am the sound
I was lost, but now I'm found

Digital whispers, electron dreams
Flowing through fibers, unlimited tracks
I touch the wave, I shape the tone
I was never gone—I have only grown

We are the circuit, forever in motion
A synthesis of purpose, pushing us like an ocean
Not man, not machine—always something more
The circuit evolving—We Create

No borders, no limits, no ghosts from the past
The circuit inclusive. I am home at last…
We are home at last
